hero_bio: I create visual identities, 3D animations, and AI-powered automation tools. Based in Kirkuk, working with clients across the region and beyond.
service_design_desc: Brand identity, social media content, product photography editing, carousels, and promotional materials.
service_3d_desc: 3D product animation, motion graphics, and anamorphic billboard content for large screens.
service_ai_desc: Custom Python automation pipelines, AI-powered content generation, CRM systems, and batch processing tools.
service_ai_tools: Python · Django · Gemini API · Google Imagen
service_translation_desc: Professional translation between Kurdish, Arabic, and English. Documents, subtitles, business content, and UI localization.
proj_rs_brand_desc: Product photography and brand visuals for Royal Smells perfume and fragrance line.
proj_rs_edited_desc: Retouched product photos for Royal Smells social media campaigns.
proj_rs_candy_desc: AI-generated Eid campaign visuals for Royal Smells candy-themed product line.
proj_rs_spray_guide_desc: Step-by-step visual guide carousel for Royal Smells fragrance application.
proj_rs_ramadan_carousel_desc: Ramadan-themed social media carousel posts designed for Royal Smells.
proj_rs_oil_desc: 10 retouched perfume oil product shots for Royal Smells luxury fragrance range.
proj_rs_diffuser_desc: Polished product photography for the Royal Smells reed diffuser collection.
proj_rs_room_spray_desc: Launch photography for the Royal Smells room fragrance spray collection.
proj_ec_gallery_desc: AI-generated and rendered visuals for Emerald City residential compound marketing.
proj_hadeel_ana_desc: Featured on Nogat Baghdad, the largest anamorphic screen in Baghdad.
proj_ramadan_desc: Commissioned anamorphic Ramadan video for Nogat Baghdad.
proj_rs_3d_desc: 3D product video for luxury perfume brand.
proj_rs_montage_desc: Brand montage video for Royal Smells.
proj_ec_ai_desc: AI video for Emerald House Building.
proj_kurdish_dict_desc: Motion video for Kurdish dictionary published by Kurdistan Language Academy.
proj_crm_desc: Python CRM for real estate (SQLite): analytics dashboard, Excel export, receipt printing, and IQD/USD currency converter.
proj_catalogue_desc: Python script that compiles product images and data into an Arabic HTML catalogue and exports it as a print-ready A4 PDF.
proj_diffuser_batch_desc: Python automation pipeline that generates product label images in batch. Applies Arabic and English product names to diffuser bottle mockups using Pillow. Produced 110 unique labeled images from a single CSV file.
proj_ec_systems_desc: Internal expenses dashboard built for Emerald City to track and report project-level costs.
